transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my AC unit won't turn on and it's getting bad! This is Linda Park at 640 Willow Way. Dispatcher: Okay Linda, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 640 Willow Way right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: AC unit won't turn on
